gameTitle: Taiko no Tatsujin DS: Touch de Dokodon!

achievements.title: Handpan Amateur
achievements.description: Collect a Total of 30 Trophies.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Bongo Novice
achievements.description: Collect a Total of 60 Trophies.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Drum Master
achievements.description: Collect a Total of 100 Trophies.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Taiko God
achievements.description: Collect a Total of 140 Trophies.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Senpai of the Beat
achievements.description: Obtain the Grandmaster Rank in the Every-Day Dojo.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Pac-Man no Tatsujin
achievements.description: Clear the Song [ナムコットメドレー] on Normal or higher while playing a yellow Don-chan without any Clothing and using the Pac-Man Sounds.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Ballad of the Digestion
achievements.description: Clear any Song on Normal or higher while using the Fart Sounds.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Masked Singer
achievements.description: Unlock all 35 Headgears.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Taiko Sheathing
achievements.description: Unlock all 35 Clothings.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Gimme the Beat
achievements.description: Unlock all 21 Taiko Sounds.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Private Concert
achievements.description: Unlock all 35 Songs.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Enter Special Mode
achievements.description: Unlock all 7 Modifiers.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Kanran Eel Challenge [I]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [アンパンマンのマーチ] on Easy with 50.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Kanran Eel Challenge [II]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [Together] on Easy with a Max Combo of 20 or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Kanran Eel Challenge [III]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [ドラえもんのうた] on Easy with 70.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Kanran Eel Challenge [IV]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [獣拳戦隊ゲキレンジャー] on Easy with a Max Combo of 40 or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Kanran Eel Challenge [V]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [プリキュア5 スマイルGoGo!] on Easy with 30x Good or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Kanran Eel Challenge [VI]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [タッチ] on Easy with the Reverse-Modifier activated.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Futsuu Eel Challenge [I]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [夏祭り] on Normal with 200.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Futsuu Eel Challenge [II]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [決意の朝に] on Normal with a Max Combo of 50 or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Futsuu Eel Challenge [III]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [DANCE2 feat.ソイソース] on Normal with the Double Speed-Modifier activated.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Futsuu Eel Challenge [IV]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [気分上々↑↑] on Normal with 250.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Futsuu Eel Challenge [V]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [マタアイマショウ] on Normal with 60x Good or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Futsuu Eel Challenge [VI]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [さくらんぼ] on Normal with the Invisible-Modifier activated.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Muzukashii Eel Challenge [I]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [名探偵コナン メイン・テーマ] on Hard with 300.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Muzukashii Eel Challenge [II]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [たらこ・たらこ・たらこ] on Hard with a Max Combo of 50 or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Muzukashii Eel Challenge [III]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [スーパーマリオブラザーズ] on Hard with 350.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Muzukashii Eel Challenge [IV]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [交響曲第7番から] on Hard with 180x Good or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Muzukashii Eel Challenge [V]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [もりのくまさん] on Hard with the Triple Speed-Modifier activated.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Muzukashii Eel Challenge [VI]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [キミにタッチ！] on Hard with 420.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Muzukashii Eel Challenge [VII]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [ウィリアム・テル序曲] on Hard with a Max Combo of 200 or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Muzukashii Eel Challenge [VIII]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [もじぴったんメドレー] on Hard with 250x Good or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Muzukashii Eel Challenge [XI]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [WON'T BE LONG] on Hard with the Quadruple Speed-Modifier activated.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oni Eel Challenge [I]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [ナムコットメドレー] on Oni with 450.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oni Eel Challenge [II]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [クラシックメドレー (ウェディング編)] on Oni with a Max Combo of 250 or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oni Eel Challenge [III]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [天国と地獄 序曲] on Oni with 300x Good or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oni Eel Challenge [IV]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [いぬのおまわりさん] on Oni with 450.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oni Eel Challenge [V]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [GO MY WAY!!] on Oni with a Max Combo of 400 or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oni Eel Challenge [VI]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [風雲！バチお先生] on Oni with 800.000 Points or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oni Eel Challenge [VII]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [KAGEKIYO] on Oni with a Max Combo of 765 or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oni Eel Challenge [VIII]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [熊蜂の飛行] on Oni with the Triple Speed-Modifier activated.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oni Eel Challenge [IX]
achievements.description: After obtaining the Challenge Letter clear the Song [てんぢく2000] on Oni with 555x Good or more.
